text.title: Program Weekly Note Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping note state to a rule.

branch.when: headline_too_long == false AND evidence_missing == false AND risks_count != 3

conclusion.verdict: reduce to exactly the 3 risks that moved most

branch.when: headline_too_long == false AND evidence_missing == false AND risks_count == 3 AND asks_malformed == true
headline_too_long == false AND evidence_missing == false AND risks_count == 3 AND asks_malformed == false AND outcomes_missing == true
headline_too_long == false AND evidence_missing == false AND risks_count == 3 AND asks_malformed == false AND outcomes_missing == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: headline_too_long=false, evidence_missing=false, risks_count==3, asks_malformed=false, outcomes_missing=false → accept note.
